---
title: "Comparison Dashboard"
format: dashboard
---

```{python}
#| output: false
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

data = pd.DataFrame({
    'category': ['A', 'B', 'A', 'C', 'B', 'A', 'C', 'C'],
    'value': [10, 25, 30, 45, 50, 65, 80, 95]
})

ojs_define(my_data = data)
```

## Row {height="60%"}

### Column {width="50%"}

```{ojs}
//| title: "Scenario A: Controls & Table"
// Left Side Logic
viewof min_val_A = Inputs.range([0, 100], {value: 20, step: 5, label: "Min Value A:"})

filtered_data_A = transpose(my_data).filter(d => d.value >= min_val_A)

Inputs.table(filtered_data_A)
```

### Column {width="50%"}

```{ojs}
//| title: "Scenario B: Controls & Table"
// Right Side Logic
viewof min_val_B = Inputs.range([0, 100], {value: 50, step: 5, label: "Min Value B:"})

filtered_data_B = transpose(my_data).filter(d => d.value >= min_val_B)

Inputs.table(filtered_data_B)
```

## Row {height="40%"}

### Column

```{ojs}
//| title: "Plot A"
Plot.plot({
  marks: [
    Plot.barY(filtered_data_A, {x: "category", y: "value", fill: "category"})
  ]
})
```

### Column

```{ojs}
//| title: "Plot B"
Plot.plot({
  marks: [
    Plot.barY(filtered_data_B, {x: "category", y: "value", fill: "category"})
  ],
  y: {domain: [0, 100]} // Fixing the axis makes comparison easier
})
```
